app.name: Wire Web App
app.one_liner: A secure, end-to-end encrypted web-based messenger with real-time collaboration features.

screens.name: Main Conversation View
screens.purpose: Display active conversations, shared files, and enable real-time messaging and collaboration.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a shared file or message item to the user's Drive with metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate WebSocket connection for real-time sync
acceptance_tests: Favorite conversations persist across devices after toggling.
Multiple files can be shared in a single message with contextual text.
